nodes.name: Parker's antbird
nodes.summary: Parker's antbird（Parker's antbird，学名 Cercomacroides parkeri），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于次生林，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits the understorey and edges of humid subtropical montane forest, nearby secondary forest, and bamboo thickets in both forest types

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits the understorey and edges of humid subtropical montane forest, nearby secondary forest, and bamboo thickets in both forest types

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered fairly common. "As is the case with all species that inhabit humid montane forest, Parker's Antbird is vulnerable to deforestation, which is a severe problem in the Colombian Andes
